name: SQLi UNION SELECT
description: Detects UNION based SQL injection attempts
suggestion: Use parameterized queries and validate all untrusted input

name: SQLi Boolean OR Tautology
description: Detects OR based numeric tautology expressions
suggestion: Use prepared statements and reject unexpected query syntax

name: SQLi Boolean AND Tautology
description: Detects AND based numeric tautology expressions
suggestion: Use parameterized queries and server-side input validation

name: SQLi Time Delay Functions
description: Detects database time delay functions used in blind SQL injection
suggestion: Use parameterized queries and restrict database function privileges

name: SQLi Information Schema
description: Detects attempts to enumerate SQL metadata
suggestion: Use least-privilege database accounts and parameterized queries

name: SQLi System Tables
description: Detects access to common database system catalogs
suggestion: Restrict catalog access and use parameterized queries

name: SQLi Stacked Query
description: Detects stacked SQL statements after a semicolon
suggestion: Disable multi-statement execution and use prepared statements

name: SQLi Comment Sequence
description: Detects SQL comment markers commonly used to truncate queries
suggestion: Use parameterized queries and validate input structure

name: SQLi File Read Function
description: Detects SQL functions capable of reading server files
suggestion: Revoke file privileges and use a least-privilege database account

name: SQLi File Write Clause
description: Detects SQL clauses that write query output to files
suggestion: Revoke database file privileges and restrict writable directories

name: SQLi Hex Payload
description: Detects long hexadecimal literals often used to obfuscate SQL payloads
suggestion: Normalize input and use parameterized queries

name: SQLi Database Version Probe
description: Detects attempts to query database identity or version
suggestion: Suppress database error details and use parameterized queries

name: XSS Script Tag
description: Detects embedded script tags in HTTP input
suggestion: Apply context-aware output encoding and sanitize HTML input

name: XSS JavaScript URI
description: Detects JavaScript URI handlers
suggestion: Allowlist safe URI schemes and encode output by context

name: XSS Event Handler
description: Detects common inline browser event handlers
suggestion: Remove inline event attributes and sanitize untrusted HTML

name: XSS SVG Payload
description: Detects SVG based event-handler payloads
suggestion: Sanitize SVG content and enforce a restrictive Content Security Policy

name: XSS Image Error Payload
description: Detects image error-handler XSS payloads
suggestion: Sanitize HTML attributes and apply context-aware output encoding

name: XSS Iframe Tag
description: Detects injected iframe elements
suggestion: Sanitize user-controlled HTML and restrict frame sources with CSP

name: XSS Document Cookie Access
description: Detects scripts attempting to access browser cookies
suggestion: Use HttpOnly cookies and encode untrusted output

name: XSS Data HTML URI
description: Detects HTML data URIs that may execute active content
suggestion: Allowlist URI schemes and apply a restrictive Content Security Policy

name: XSS Expression Function
description: Detects legacy CSS expression based script execution
suggestion: Sanitize style input and disallow user-controlled CSS expressions

name: Command Injection Unix Shell Separator
description: Detects shell commands following command separators
suggestion: Avoid shell invocation and pass arguments through safe process APIs

name: Command Injection Passwd Read
description: Detects attempts to read the Unix password account file
suggestion: Remove command execution paths and run services with least privilege

name: Command Injection Windows CMD
description: Detects Windows command interpreter execution
suggestion: Avoid command string construction and use constrained process APIs

name: Command Injection PowerShell
description: Detects PowerShell execution markers
suggestion: Disable unnecessary PowerShell access and validate process arguments

name: Command Injection Shell Command Substitution
description: Detects Unix shell command substitution syntax
suggestion: Avoid shell evaluation and treat user input only as data

name: Command Injection Network Downloader
description: Detects command-line tools downloading remote content
suggestion: Block outbound execution paths and allowlist required network destinations

name: Command Injection Netcat
description: Detects netcat-style outbound connection commands
suggestion: Remove shell execution features and restrict outbound network access

name: Command Injection Chmod Executable
description: Detects commands that make files executable
suggestion: Prevent command execution and restrict filesystem permissions

name: Command Injection Windows System Utility
description: Detects Windows utilities frequently abused for payload execution
suggestion: Apply application control and never concatenate untrusted command arguments

name: WebShell PHP Eval
description: Detects PHP-style dynamic code evaluation commonly used by webshells
suggestion: Remove malicious files and prohibit dynamic evaluation of untrusted data

name: WebShell PHP Assert
description: Detects PHP assertion calls used as code execution primitives
suggestion: Disable dangerous PHP functions and audit uploaded scripts

name: WebShell Base64 Decode
description: Detects Base64 decoding frequently used to conceal webshell payloads
suggestion: Inspect decoded content and enforce strict upload validation

name: WebShell System Execution
description: Detects server-side command execution functions
suggestion: Disable unnecessary execution functions and remove unauthorized scripts

name: WebShell Preg Replace Eval
description: Detects legacy PHP regular-expression code evaluation
suggestion: Upgrade unsupported PHP code and remove the evaluation modifier

name: WebShell ASP Request Execute
description: Detects classic ASP request-driven code execution
suggestion: Remove unauthorized ASP files and validate all request parameters

name: WebShell JSP Runtime Exec
description: Detects Java Runtime command execution used in JSP webshells
suggestion: Remove malicious JSP files and apply application server least privilege

name: WebShell File Upload Marker
description: Detects uploads of common server-executable script extensions
suggestion: Allowlist upload types and store uploads outside the web root

name: Sensitive File Environment Configuration
description: Detects requests for environment configuration files
suggestion: Deny public access to environment files and rotate exposed secrets

name: Sensitive File Git Metadata
description: Detects requests for exposed Git repository metadata
suggestion: Block dot-directories and remove repository metadata from the web root

name: Sensitive File WordPress Configuration
description: Detects requests for WordPress database configuration
suggestion: Block configuration files and rotate database credentials after exposure

name: Sensitive File Process Environment
description: Detects attempts to read the running process environment
suggestion: Reject traversal attempts and isolate the application filesystem

name: Sensitive File SSH Private Key
description: Detects requests for SSH private keys or authorization files
suggestion: Keep SSH material outside served paths and rotate exposed keys

name: Sensitive File Cloud Credentials
description: Detects requests for common cloud credential files
suggestion: Block hidden credential paths and immediately revoke exposed credentials

name: Sensitive File Backup Archive
description: Detects probing for commonly named backup archives
suggestion: Remove backups from public directories and use randomized protected storage
